worksForYou.title: Works for you, grows with you
worksForYou.sub: Memory and personalization under your control.

skills.title: Security
skills.desc: Tool guard before execution, file guard on paths, skill scan before install, access control at the edge—four layers, one coherent stack.

control.title: Multi-agent Workspaces
control.desc: Multiple isolated workspaces in one process—split config and data, route each request to the right agent; scale out roles and let agents message each other when tasks need teamwork.

apps.title: Edge & Cloud LLMs
apps.desc: Wire up local or cloud providers your way; keep inferring when you're offline. A CoPaw-tuned on-device small model is coming soon for edge–cloud teamwork and predictable cost.

memory.title: Memory
memory.desc: Compress context and tool output; turn experience into reusable memory—personalization stays under your control.

toolkit.title: Tools, Skills & MCP
toolkit.desc: 20+ built-in tools and skills with hot reload; plug in MCP and add skills anytime—your toolkit grows with CoPaw.

clientVoices.title: Listen to what the community says about CoPaw
clientVoices.sub: See real feedback from CoPaw users

t1.text: CoPaw is a truly out-of-the-box, general-purpose AI agent framework. As CoPaw's underlying capabilities continue to iterate, our self-developed business agents can also achieve a leap in intelligence, significantly reducing long-term maintenance costs and technical liabilities.

t2.text: I feel it's much easier to use than OpenClaw, and it's so much easier to get started! My suggestion is to release a version that natively supports multiple roles working together; I'll be using yours!

t3.text: It's great, very easy to use, and responds quickly when used with Qwen's models. I suggest you consider using it on embedded devices to reduce resource consumption.

t4.text: The code looks so clean and easy to understand. Being a developer myself, would love to play with it more.

t5.text: MCP hot-swapping without restarting is the standout feature for agent workflows. That means you can extend CoPaw's toolset mid-session, no context break, no restart penalty. Skill hub + clawHub integration means the ecosystem compounds fast.

t6.text: CoPaw is a better option; OpenClaw is too complicated and requires some understanding. However, CoPaw currently lacks multi-agent functionality, though it's similar in other aspects. For features it lacks, AI can write them.

brandstory.title: Why CoPaw?
brandstory.para1: CoPaw represents both a Co Personal Agent Workstation and a "co-paw"—a partner always by your side.
brandstory.para2: More than just a cold tool, CoPaw is a warm "little paw" always ready to lend a hand (or a paw!). It is the ultimate teammate for your digital life.

channels.title: Every channel
channels.desc: DingTalk, Feishu, QQ, Discord, iMessage, and more — one assistant, connect as you need.

private.title: Under your control
private.desc: Memory and personalization under your control. Deploy locally or in the cloud; scheduled reminders and collaboration to any channel.

skills.title: Skills
skills.desc: Built-in Cron; custom skills in your workspace, auto-loaded.

testimonials.title: What people say
testimonials.1: This is what a personal assistant should be: one entry, every channel.
testimonials.2: Cron and heartbeat are super practical. Add your own skills; data stays local.
testimonials.3: Teams who want full control love it.

usecases.title: What you can do with CoPaw
usecases.sub: Memory and personalization under your control.

social.1: Daily digest of hot posts from Xiaohongshu, Zhihu, and Reddit based on your interests, with recommendations that improve over time.
social.2: Daily summaries of new videos from Bilibili or YouTube by channel or keyword, saving you time browsing.
social.3: Analyze your Xiaohongshu or Zhihu account to uncover content patterns and inform what to post next.

creative.1: Describe your goal to CoPaw and set it to run overnight; get a working draft by the next day.
creative.2: From topic selection and material gathering to direction setting, CoPaw supports the full video content workflow.

productivity.1: Daily digests of newsletters and important emails, delivered to your DingTalk, Feishu or QQ chat.
productivity.2: Contacts surfaced from email and calendar, with natural-language search for people and past interactions.
productivity.3: Log diet and symptoms; CoPaw analyzes and surfaces patterns over time.

research.1: Track tech and AI company earnings and news; get key points and summaries automatically.
research.2: Save links, articles, and posts to a personal knowledge base and reuse them across workflows.

assistant.1: Organize and search local files, read and summarize documents; request files in DingTalk, Feishu or QQ and receive them in the current chat.

explore.1: Explore more possibilities—combine Skills and cron into your own agentic app.

quickstart.title: Quick start
quickstart.heroSub: Your personal AI assistant in minutes. One command, or double-click the app
quickstart.serviceNotice: Your personal AI assistant in minutes. One command, or double-click the app—do it yourself, done easily.
quickstart.hintBefore: Install → init → start. Configure channels to use CoPaw on DingTalk, Feishu, QQ, etc. See

desc.pip: If you prefer managing Python yourself, we would like to recommand:
desc.script: No Python pre-setup required, one command installs everything.
desc.docker: Quick deployment with official Docker images, isolated environment and easy management
desc.cloud: One-click cloud deployment or online execution, no local setup required.
desc.desktop: Standalone desktop app with bundled Python environment, all dependencies, and frontend assets. Double-click to run, no command line, no prerequisites required.
